name: joust-engine
description: Joust Engine — model-diverse agentic loops from concept to PR.

plugins.name: joust-engine
plugins.description: Model-diverse agentic loops from concept to PR. Hand it a task; it produces N independent attempts in parallel across a mix of models, judges them blind with a fixed Opus reviewer, and names a winner. Two-pass adds a guided second round; grand loops implement each winner into a real branch and open a PR. Trigger with the @@JE sigil or the 'joust:N' prose marker.
